failed->running.arrival_angle_note: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14, angle corollary: the arrival angle follows the bow's construction — the snug chain that shallows the 32.2 dev to 22.5 shallows the hand file's 42.9deg arrival to the render's 36.9 at the same construction; enrolled when the arrival-angle measure joined the extractor after this fixture's last generation
failed->running.chord_dev_note: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: the lens bow is span-proportional; the snug chain shortens the span, so the render's shallower 22.5 dev is the same construction at the new chain width

caption_text: State machine · a job runs to a terminal success, or fails and retries back into running

cards.dims_superseded: snug-width ruling 2026-07-14: hand-file width citations are ceilings — cards solve to their own ink + anchor pads; the hand file's wider cards are dress history

port_tolerance_note: USER RULING (term-ring-aware boundaries): the succeeded hero's terminal ring (sm-term) draws 6px past its plain card, but this hand specimen's own arrival still tips at the plain face (an authoring inconsistency, not a law) -- arrivals now stop at the ring's outer face, superseding the specimen's own 0.5px envelope. card_rects()/measure_port_max() do not read the ring shape, so this fixture cites the amendment directly rather than a re-extraction silently reverting it.
